name: Khushal Vadhavana
title: Data Analyst, Full Stack Developer, Freelancer
summary: Eager Data Analyst and Front-End (React JS) Developer with a strong foundation in building dynamic web applications and performing complex data analysis. Experienced in industrial automation data processing and CRM dashboard development.

description: Clearing and preprocessing data for IOCL automation reports.
Automating routine reporting in Excel to streamline workflows.
Troubleshooting industrial sensor devices and automation systems.
Developed payroll, attendance, and salary slip generation systems.
Designed admin and employee dashboards using Bootstrap and MUI.
Led development of a dynamic CRM admin dashboard.
Developed REST APIs to connect React frontend with MongoDB.
Converted Figma designs into functional React components.

projects.title: Netflix Data Analysis
projects.description: Conducted EDA on a dataset of 9,800+ movies using Python to visualize genre trends and popularity. Used Pandas, NumPy, Seaborn, and Matplotlib.

projects.title: Hotel Management System
projects.description: Built a React JS frontend for reservation tracking and room occupancy management, focusing on operational efficiency and user interface.
